title: picea excelsa subvar. cupressina
intro: Picea excelsa subvar. cupressina, also known as Himalayan cedar or Atlas cedar, is a subspecies of the Picea excelsa tree, native to the Himalayan region. This evergreen tree has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Picea excelsa subvar. cupressina include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate congestion. In herbal preparations, the leaves, bark, and essential oils of the tree are used to make teas, infusions, and inhalers that can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
